summary.text: [0-8] A large pile of chopped green leafy vegetables rests on a polished brown wooden table, flanked by clear plastic bags filled with similar greens and a vertical white strip. The scene remains entirely static with no movement, maintaining consistent lighting and reflections on the table surface. [8-10] Camera movement introduces significant motion blur to the frame, though the central pile of vegetables remains stationary. [10-12] The camera pans sharply right, shifting the pile of greens to the left edge. A hand briefly enters view reaching toward a clear plastic container with a white label on the right. The new angle reveals the floor below, where a pair of dark boots sits near a white wall.

[12-16] A hand holds a clear plastic bag filled with chopped green vegetables, displaying a white label with black text and small cyan, magenta, yellow, and black squares, followed by a blurry view of a label with white and green sections. [16-20] The bag is held steady over a wooden table, bringing a green label into sharp focus that reads "BRITISH UNWASHED SLICED CURLY KALE 200g" positioned above a loose pile of greens. [20-22] The hand rapidly moves the bag, creating significant motion blur, as the camera pans down to the table surface where a clear plastic container sits near the scattered kale. [22-26] The camera stabilizes on the large pile of chopped green kale resting beside a vertical white strip; a finger briefly obscures the top left, then a hand enters from the right to reach for the vegetables while the packaging remains visible in the background.

[26-30] A hand enters from the right, grasping a small fragment of green kale from a large pile on a wooden table near a white strip. The fingers hold the leafy piece between the thumb and forefinger, displaying it slightly above the stationary mound. [30-36] As the hand exits, the camera zooms in for an extreme close-up, filling the frame with the textured, curly dark green leaves while excluding the surrounding table. The view remains steady on the pile with minimal perspective shifts across the vegetables. [36-40] Suddenly, the camera shakes violently, blurring the greens into indistinct streaks of green and white. The chaotic motion ends as the lens is completely obscured by a large, out-of-focus reddish-brown area, likely a finger or hand blocking the view.

From [40-44], a reddish obstruction clears to reveal thick, pale green vegetable stalks mixed with leafy greens inside a clear plastic bag. A white label with black text is partially visible on the crinkled plastic. Between [44-52], the camera maintains a close-up on the stationary chopped produce, highlighting the cut texture of pale stems and darker curly leaves within the shiny, reflective packaging. The perspective shifts slightly but remains focused on the bag's contents. Finally, at [52-54], the steady view is disrupted by rapid camera movement, creating heavy motion blur with green streaks and briefly revealing a reddish-brown background surface as the perspective shifts chaotically.

[54-60] Rapid, violent camera movement creates severe motion blur, showing abstract streaks of green vegetable matter and bright reflections from clear plastic packaging against a reddish-brown surface. The shaking subsides to reveal a white product label with a green graphic logo. [60-62] The label focuses clearly, displaying text "WASHED AND READY TO COOK" and "BEST BEFORE 04 NOV" above "300G e". The camera then moves rapidly, blurring the text. [62-68] The view stabilizes on the bag's interior, filled with dark green curly kale leaves and pale stems inside crinkled clear plastic. Light reflects off the moist vegetables and packaging. The white label remains partially visible on the left edge as the camera holds a steady close-up without significant movement.

[68-72] The camera maintains a steady close-up on green leafy vegetables inside clear plastic packaging. A white label is not visible. Light reflects off the moist surfaces of chopped kale stems and curly leaves, highlighting their texture against the crinkled bag. [72-82] The camera pans to reveal a reddish-brown table surface adjacent to a white strip. Small, scattered green vegetable fragments lie on the wood, distinct from the main pile of kale on the right. The view shifts from the tight close-up to the exterior environment, maintaining focus on the wooden surface and scattered greens with minimal movement.

[82-94] A large silver metal bowl filled with chopped green leafy vegetables rests on a wooden table, dominating the high-angle frame. A white plate is visible in the upper right background, and a white appliance with a dark window is positioned on the left. The camera maintains a steady view of the prepared greens, shifting focus from previously scattered table fragments. Between 88-90s, the camera slowly pulls back, revealing more of the appliance, while the bowl remains stationary. The scene is largely static, with no changes to the arrangement of the vegetables or the position of the plate and appliance, keeping the focus on the bowl of greens throughout the segment.

[8-10] Camera movement introduces significant motion blur to the frame, though the central pile of vegetables remains stationary. [10-12] The camera pans sharply right, shifting the pile of greens to the left edge. A hand briefly enters view reaching toward a clear plastic container with a white label on the right. The new angle reveals the floor below, where a pair of dark boots sits near a white wall. [12-16] A hand holds a clear plastic bag filled with chopped green vegetables, displaying a white label with black text and small cyan, magenta, yellow, and black squares, followed by a blurry view of a label with white and green sections. [16-20] The bag is held steady over a wooden table, bringing a green label into sharp focus that reads "BRITISH UNWASHED SLICED CURLY KALE 200g" positioned above a loose pile of greens. [20-22] The hand rapidly moves the bag, creating significant motion blur,

[26-30] A hand enters from the right, grasping a small fragment of green kale from a large pile on a wooden table near a white strip. The fingers hold the leafy piece between the thumb and forefinger, displaying it slightly above the stationary mound. [30-36] As the hand exits, the camera zooms in for an extreme close-up, filling the frame with the textured, curly dark green leaves while excluding the surrounding table. The view remains steady on the pile with minimal perspective shifts across the vegetables. [36-40] Suddenly, the camera shakes violently, blurring the greens into indistinct streaks of green and white. The chaotic motion ends as the lens is completely obscured by a large, out-of-focus reddish-brown area, likely a finger or hand blocking the view.

From [40-44], a reddish obstruction clears to reveal thick, pale green vegetable stalks mixed with leafy greens inside a clear plastic bag. A white label with black text is partially visible on the crinkled plastic. Between [44-52], the camera maintains a close-up on the stationary chopped produce, highlighting the cut texture of pale stems and darker curly leaves within the shiny, reflective packaging. The perspective shifts slightly but remains focused on the bag's contents. Finally, at [52-54], the steady view is disrupted by rapid camera movement, creating heavy motion blur with green streaks and briefly revealing a reddish-brown background surface as the perspective shifts chaotically.

[54-60] Rapid, violent camera movement creates severe motion blur, showing abstract streaks of green vegetable matter and bright reflections from clear plastic packaging against a reddish-brown surface. The shaking subsides to reveal a white product label with a green graphic logo. [60-62] The label focuses clearly, displaying text "WASHED AND READY TO COOK" and "BEST BEFORE 04 NOV" above "300G e". The camera then moves rapidly, blurring the text. [62-68] The view stabilizes on the bag's interior, filled with dark green curly kale leaves and pale stems inside crinkled clear plastic. Light reflects off the moist vegetables and packaging. The white label remains partially visible on the left edge as the camera holds a steady close-up without significant movement.

[68-72] The camera maintains a steady close-up on green leafy vegetables inside clear plastic packaging. A white label is not visible. Light reflects off the moist surfaces of chopped kale stems and curly leaves, highlighting their texture against the crinkled bag. [72-82] The camera pans to reveal a reddish-brown table surface adjacent to a white strip. Small, scattered green vegetable fragments lie on the wood, distinct from the main pile of kale on the right. The view shifts from the tight close-up to the exterior environment, maintaining focus on the wooden surface and scattered greens with minimal movement.

A hand continues adding chopped green leafy vegetables to the black frying pan, piling them over the onions. The wooden spoon is partially buried under the greens. The white bowl with butter and a knife remains visible in the bottom left corner.

A hand adds more chopped green vegetables to the black pan, increasing the volume over the sautéing onions. The wooden spoon lies amidst the greens. The view shifts right to show a red pot with a glass lid on the next burner, while the white bowl containing butter stays in the bottom left corner.

The black frying pan is now filled with a large mound of chopped green leafy vegetables. The wooden spoon rests on top of the greens. To the right, a red pot with a glass lid sits on the stove. The white bowl containing a block of butter and a knife remains visible in the bottom left corner.

compressed_segments.text: [0-8] A large pile of chopped green leafy vegetables rests on a polished brown wooden table, flanked by clear plastic bags filled with similar greens and a vertical white strip. The scene remains entirely static with no movement, maintaining consistent lighting and reflections on the table surface. [8-10] Camera movement introduces significant motion blur to the frame, though the central pile of vegetables remains stationary.
